description: Occupants on the West side of the 4StoreyBuilding are complaining about afternoon glare. Implement a glare control strategy in eQUEST by applying 'Venetian Blinds' to all windows on the exterior walls of West-facing zones (spaces containing '.W'). The blinds must use a hierarchical schedule named 'Glare-Year-Sch' (composed of 'Glare-Week-Sch' and 'Glare-Day-Sch'), with 'Glare-Day-Sch' set to 0.0 from 00:00-14:00, 1.0 from 14:00-18:00, and 0.0 from 18:00-24:00. Run the full annual DOE-2.2 simulation and save the project.
